messages.content: User reported fresh session init loses conversations. Asked to fix it. Also asked why create fresh files and noted it should not be in mindmap.

Fixed session_init.py to auto-archive previous session (messages + summaries) before wiping. Updated memory_recall.py to read embedded summaries from auto-archives. Tested end-to-end. Agreed no mindmap node needed — script-level behavior under programs_over_improvisation.

summaries.summary: Fix: session_init.py now auto-archives previous conversation before fresh init; memory_recall.py reads embedded summaries
